title: spergularia maritima subsp. tunetana
intro: Spergularia maritima subsp. tunetana is a subspecies of the annual or biennial plant, Spergularia maritima, which belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is also known as sea sand-spurrey, and it is native to parts of North Africa. The medicinal properties of Spergularia maritima subsp. tunetana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects.
